introSection: Nessi is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Diego Cavazza currently located at Coney Beach Pleasure Park in Porthcawl, Bridgend, Wales, UK.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has a single helix.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train has a dragon theme.

fullText:
Nessi is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Diego Cavazza currently located at Coney Beach Pleasure Park in Porthcawl, Bridgend, Wales, UK.



The ride has a single helix.

Yellow track and supports.

The train has a dragon theme.
